checks.name: Neumann/free: L = B^T B has diag {1,2,2,2,2,1}, zero row sums, kernel = constants, rank 5
solvability: L x = e_1 inconsistent (best residual = 1/sqrt(6), the constant component); L x = e_1 - e_2 solvable, +const still solves
pinv gauge: L+ 1 = 0, 1^T L+ = 0; balanced f -> L(L+ f) = f and sum(L+ f) = 0
USER FINDING: TriangularRankOneQ[GroundedInverse[L,1]] -- corner ranks [0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1], all <= 1 (exact Fractions)
USER FINDING: TriangularRankQ[PseudoInverse[L], 2] -- corner ranks [1, 2, 2, 2, 2, 1], all <= 2 (exact Fractions)
pinv triangular rank EXACTLY 2: max corner rank = 2, rank-2 blocks at j = [2, 3, 4, 5], TriangularRankQ[.,1] = False
TriangularRankOneQ[GroundedInverse[L,k]] for ALL k = 1..6 (exact certificates [1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1])
GroundedInverse[L,1] == [min(i,j) - 1] EXACTLY (integer Brownian-motion kernel)
interior grounding k = 2..5: exact block split, cross-blocks == 0 (Markov separator), blocks == [k - max(i,j)] and [min(i,j) - k]
Dirichlet both: free 8-path Laplacian minus wall rows/cols == L + e1e1^T + e6e6^T == tridiag(-1,2,-1) == suite laplacian_1d(6)
bridge: inv(tridiag) == [min(i,j)(7-max(i,j))/7] EXACTLY == (1/h)(min(x,y)-xy), h = 1/7; triangular rank 1 (corner ranks [1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1])
ROBIN closed form EXACT: inv(L + kappa e1e1^T) == [min(i,j) - 1 + 1/kappa] for kappa in {1/100, 1/10, 1, 10, 100}; u_i = i - 1 + 1/kappa, v_j = 1
ROBIN rank: TriangularRankOneQ holds for every kappa > 0 (exact at 5 kappas)
ROBIN float sweep: closed form holds on kappa = 1e-6..1e6 (13 pts, rel err) and SVD triangular rank 1 at every kappa
ROBIN limits: kappa*G -> 11^T as kappa -> 0 (Neumann blow-up along constants); G -> grounded-at-1 as kappa -> inf, error == 1/kappa
Gantmacher-Krein: 20 random irreducible SPD tridiagonals (n = 6, 32) -> inverse has SVD triangular rank 1
GAUGE IDENTITY: C.GroundedInverse(L,k).C IDENTICAL for all k = 1..6 (exact) and satisfies all four Moore-Penrose axioms exactly => == L+; numpy pinv agrees
+1 rank from centering: L+ upper triangle == u1 v1^T + u2 v2^T exactly, u1_i = (i-1) - rowmean_i + grandmean (motion pair), v2_j = -rowmean_j (centering pair)
R_eff gauge-invariance: identical from GroundedInverse(L,k) for every k AND from pinv, == |i - j| EXACTLY (full 6x6, exact rationals)
Sturm-Liouville factors: bridge u=i, v=(7-j)/7; motion u=i-1, v=1; mirrored u=1, v=6-j; Robin(kappa=1) u=i, v=1 -- all EXACT; interior k=3 one pair PER block; numeric extraction matches
semiseparable == separator rank: max corner-block rank equals max off-diagonal-block rank (report 14) on pinv, bridge, Robin, and all 6 groundings
n = 32: grounded inverse == exact min-kernels + block split for ALL k = 1..32, SVD rank 1; pinv triangular rank exactly 2 (max corner rank 2); gauge identity; R_eff == |i-j|
n = 32 continuum: bridge inverse == (1/h)(min(x,y) - xy), motion inverse == (1/h) min(x,y) (h = 1/33)
n = 32 ROBIN grid: inv(L + kappa e1e1^T) == [min(i,j) - 1 + 1/kappa] on the 9-kappa widget grid, SVD rank 1 each

dirichlet_both.operator: tridiag(-1,2,-1) = L + e1e1^T + e6e6^T (append walls, delete)
dirichlet_both.uv_family: bridge: u ~ x, v ~ (1-x); G ~ x(1-s)

ground_1.operator: delete row/col 1 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,1])
ground_1.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

ground_2.operator: delete row/col 2 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,2])
ground_2.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

ground_3.operator: delete row/col 3 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,3])
ground_3.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

ground_4.operator: delete row/col 4 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,4])
ground_4.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

ground_5.operator: delete row/col 5 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,5])
ground_5.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

ground_6.operator: delete row/col 6 of L, invert, re-embed (GroundedInverse[L,6])
ground_6.uv_family: motion: min-family run away from k; one pair per irreducible block

pinv.uv_family: TWO pairs: motion pair + centering pair (C = I - 11^T/6 adds +1 rank)

robin.operator: L + kappa e1 e1^T (partial grounding through resistor 1/kappa)

gauge.statement: L+ == C . GroundedInverse(L,k) . C for EVERY k = 1..6; proved exactly via the four Moore-Penrose axioms; all groundings coincide after double centering

meta.rank_tolerance: n=6: exact Fraction Gaussian elimination (no tolerance); floats: numpy matrix_rank default tol = sigma_max * max(m,n) * eps (2.22e-16)
meta.conventions: 1-based node labels to mirror Mathematica; unit resistors; bridge continuum x_i = i/(n+1); motion continuum x_i = (i-1)/(n+1)
